title: Dreamy Creamy Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A winey and creamy Saudi Arabian dish featuring lamb, little gem lettuce, and a blend of spices, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This high-protein friendly dish is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the dry white wine and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the heavy cream and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve the lamb and sauce over the little gem lettuce leaves.
